task: Search for smart TVs with a screen size of 55 to 65 inches and filter the results to show only those that have an LED display.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task on Google Shopping. It searched for smart TVs, then applied the 55–65 inches screen size filter and the LED display filter. Final evidence shows the page title 'led 55 inches to 65 inches smart tvs - Google Shopping' and the refinement chips include 'Remove 55 – 65 inches filter. Selected.' and 'Remove LED filter. Selected.', confirming both required filters were active.
final_result_response: Done. The Google Shopping results are filtered for 55-65 inch smart TVs with LED display selected.
action_history: Opening Google Shopping: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/shopping?udm=28');
Searching for smart TVs: await page.locator('e3').fill('smart TVs');
Searching for smart TVs: await page.locator('e7').click();
Applying the screen-size filter: await page.locator('e39').click();
Applying the LED display filter: await page.locator('e61').click();
